name: Chauncey
backstory: Junior in Computer Science, taking Operating Systems, Computer Ethics and Society, intro to statistical methods, and AI agents. Gets overwhelmed by the volume of work and complexity of concepts.
emotional_triggers: write what kinds of academic or social situations drain you most
existing_strengths: Takes small step when working. They do it passively over a long period, such as watching television while having their laptop and switching between both doing work.
what_success_looks_like: If given work early, they will complete it and have it ready. They require more time and they do fine with that.
